title: FindingNemo Extraction 2: Phenol-free Method
author: Inswasti Cahyani
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bxx2ppqe

steps.title: This protocol is adapted from Monarch®...
steps.instruction: This protocol is adapted from Monarch® HMW DNA Extraction Kit for Cells & Blood. Either SDS (anionic surfactant) or CTAB (cationic surfactant) can be used in the lysis buffer. Providing alternative surfactants in the lysis buffer may help with different cell systems that require different biochemistry.

steps.title: Insert a bead retainer to a collection tube
steps.instruction: Insert a bead retainer to a collection tube. Pour the beads into the bead retainer and spin for 1 s in a mini centrifuge (or the shortest time possible) to remove residual wash buffer. Keep the bead retainer.

steps.title: Quickly pour the beads into a...
steps.instruction: Quickly pour the beads into a new 2 ml low-bind tube and immediately add 250 µl of elution buffer. Do not let the beads with DNA dry out. (As an alternative, 250 μl of elution buffer can be aliquoted into a 2 ml tube prior to this step.)

steps.title: Incubate at 37 o C for 30 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 o C for 30 min. Gently aspirate and dispense the eluate over the glass beads at regular intervals with a wide-bore P1000 tip to aid elution. 37 °C 00:30:00, mix per 10 min

steps.title: Insert the bead retainer from step...
steps.instruction: Insert the bead retainer from step 15 into a clean 2 ml DNA low-bind tube. Pour the beads from step 17 and centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 1 minute. 12000 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute

steps.title: Quantify DNA as per " UHMW...
steps.instruction: Quantify DNA as per " UHMW DNA QC " and check homogeneity by calculating %CV values. If the DNA is not sufficiently homegeneous, incubate the DNA for longer.

steps.title: Store at 4 o C or...
steps.instruction: Store at 4 o C or continue to UL Library Preparation as per " Modified ULK001 ". If only SQK-RAD004 is available, follow library preparation in " Modified RAD004 " or " KrazyStarFish (KSF) ". 4 °C, for storage

steps.title: Pellet 3 million cells in 1
steps.instruction: Pellet 3 million cells in 1.5 ml tube by centrifuging at 1000 x g for 1 min at 4 o C. 1000 x g, 4 °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Wash with PBS (make sure all...
steps.instruction: Wash with PBS (make sure all media and serum are rinsed off), spin at 1000 x g for 1 min at 4 o C. 1000 x g, 4 °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Add 149 μl of TLB-SDS or...
steps.instruction: Add 149 μl of TLB-SDS or TLB-CTAB which has been added with 100 μg RNaseA (1 μl) and vortex at full speed for 3 seconds. Make master mix of the TLB and RNaseA if handling more than one sample.

steps.title: Incubate at 37°C for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37°C for 10 minutes. 37 °C 00:10:00

steps.title: Add 140 μl TLB and 200...
steps.instruction: Add 140 μl TLB and 200 μg Proteinase K (10 μl). Mix by slow inversion 5 times or with a P1000 wide-bore pipette tip.

steps.title: Incubate at 55°C for 20 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at 55°C for 20 minutes. 55 °C 00:20:00 Shaking in a thermomixer at 300-700 rpm can help lysis and homogenization, especially when more than 3 million cells are used.

steps.title: Add 75 μl of 5M Ammonium...
steps.instruction: Add 75 μl of 5M Ammonium acetate, mix well with wide-bore P1000 pipette tip.

steps.title: Add 3 clean glass beads to the cell lysate
steps.instruction: Add 3 clean glass beads to the cell lysate.

steps.title: Add 275 μl of Isopropanol
steps.instruction: Add 275 μl of Isopropanol

steps.title: Rotate the tube with a vertical...
steps.instruction: Rotate the tube with a vertical rotator at 9 rpm for 5 minutes. 00:05:00, vertical rotator If a rotator is not available, hand inversion for 30-40 times can be used. Invert the tube slowly by hand so that a full inversion cycle takes 4-5 seconds.

steps.title: Remove and discard liquid by pipetting
steps.instruction: Remove and discard liquid by pipetting.

steps.title: Wash bound DNA with 1 ml...
steps.instruction: Wash bound DNA with 1 ml of 70% ethanol, invert tube 3 times, remove and discard ethanol.

steps.title: Repeat step 13 once with 500 μl
steps.instruction: Repeat step 13 once with 500 μl. Discard the ethanol, taking care not to disturb the DNA precipitate.
